CLAUDE_5MIN.md — MPCurver 5-Minute Catch-Up

If you are Claude and only have a few minutes, read this file first.

1. The One-Sentence Update

MPCurver is now a cavi-first package:

  • cavi is the recommended/default fitting algorithm
  • mpcurve is the unified public interface
  • csmooth_em / smooth_em are now legacy benchmark paths

2. What You Should Assume By Default

  • For single-ordering work, start from fit_mpcurve(..., algorithm = "cavi")
  • For dual-ordering / feature partition work, start from:
    • soft_two_trajectory_cavi()
    • forward_two_ordering_partition_cavi()
    • backward_two_ordering_partition_cavi()
  • Treat csmooth_em as a comparison baseline, not as the main engine

3. Where The CAVI Method Details Live

If you want the mathematical details, read these in this order:

  1. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/cavi_math_details.Rmd Full paper-style derivation of the single-ordering CAVI updates.
  2. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/cavi_vs_csmooth_math.Rmd Conceptual and mathematical comparison of cavi versus legacy csmooth_em.
  3. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/output/theory/MPCurver_CAVI_implementation_checklist.md Short implementation checklist / guardrails for the current cavi model.

If you want the user-facing workflow first, read:

  1. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/mpcurve_intro.Rmd
  2. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/partition.Rmd

4. What Was Verified Reasonably Well

Single-ordering cavi

This is in good shape.

Main points already checked:

  • elbo_trace is the real objective of interest
  • the responsibility update includes the uncertainty correction from diag(S_j)
  • model-matched simulations behave well
  • spiral / swiss-roll examples work well with suitable initialization
  • fit_mpcurve() now defaults to this path

Important:

  • loglik_trace in cavi is a plug-in observed log-likelihood diagnostic
  • it is not the true marginal log-likelihood of the latent-trajectory model

Dual-ordering cavi

This is much improved relative to the older legacy soft partition path, but:

  • partitioning can be easier than recovering the exact latent trajectories
  • non-monotone feature sets are still initialization-sensitive
  • a clean objective trace does not automatically imply perfect trajectory recovery

5. Important Empirical Lessons

Initialization

  • PCA can be fine in easy regimes
  • isomap can be clearly better in harder non-monotone regimes
  • fiedler is useful, but depends strongly on geometry

Fiedler graph fix

fiedler_ordering() now auto-adjusts the default kNN neighbor count upward if the default graph is disconnected.

So older complaints that default Fiedler loses most cells through graph fragmentation are now outdated.

6. Real-Data Example

There is now a main real-data analysis vignette:

  • /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/elife_fitness_analysis.Rmd

Dataset:

  • inst/extdata/elife-61271-fig2-data1-v2.csv

This is a mutant-by-environment fitness matrix, and the vignette explores:

  • single-ordering cavi
  • dual-ordering soft partition
  • initialization sensitivity
  • partition composition by environment
  • inferred ordering weights / trajectories

7. Files You Probably Want Open Right Away

  • /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/R/09_cavi.R
  • /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/R/10_partition_cavi.R
  • /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/R/07_mpcurve.R
  • /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/AGENTS.md
  • /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/CLAUDE.md

8. Things Not To Get Wrong

  1. Do not describe cavi as a prototype anymore.
  2. Do not re-center the package narrative around csmooth_em.
  3. Do not treat cavi loglik_trace as the true marginal log-likelihood.
  4. Do not remove the uncertainty correction from the cavi responsibility update.
  5. Do not treat vignettes/Intro.Rmd as the current package introduction.

9. If You Have 15 More Minutes

After this file, the most useful reading order is:

  1. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/cavi_math_details.Rmd
  2. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/cavi_vs_csmooth_math.Rmd
  3. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/elife_fitness_analysis.Rmd
  4. /Users/ziangzhang/Desktop/MPCurver/vignettes/soft_partition_cavi_vs_csmooth.Rmd
